[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 001010100 3

01 10 001000000 1
12 21 001101001 4
23 32 001000000 1
34 43 001000000 1
45 54 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6
56 65 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6
67 76 001000001 2
70 07 001010100 3 match 7

02 20 001000000 1
13 31 001000000 1
24 42 001100001 3
35 53 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6
46 64 001000011 3
57 75 100001100 3
60 06 001000000 1
71 17 101001001 4

14 41 001100011 4

36 63 001000000 1
47 74 001000001 2
50 05 000000100 1

72 27 001001001 3

26 62 001000001 2
37 73 001000000 1
